sections.heading: Systemic
sections.content: Systemic therapy is the primary treatment for unresectable or metastatic BTCs. First-line standard is gemcitabine/cisplatin with or without immunotherapy (durvalumab or pembrolizumab). Second-line options include FOLFOX, FOLFIRI, liposomal irinotecan combinations, and targeted therapies based on biomarker testing. Adjuvant capecitabine is recommended for resected disease.

cards.name: Cisplatin/Gemcitabine + Durvalumab
cards.detail: Nausea, myelosuppression, fatigue, hepatotoxicity, immune-related adverse events

cards.name: Cisplatin/Gemcitabine + Pembrolizumab
cards.detail: Nausea, myelosuppression, fatigue, immune-related adverse events

cards.name: Futibatinib
cards.detail: Hyperphosphatemia, stomatitis, dry eye, nail toxicity

cards.name: Dabrafenib/Trametinib
cards.detail: Fever, fatigue, nausea, rash, cardiac toxicity

timeline.title: Adjuvant Therapy
timeline.body: Preferred: Capecitabine (category 1). Alternatives: Capecitabine/gemcitabine, cisplatin/gemcitabine, single-agent gemcitabine or fluorouracil/leucovorin.

timeline.title: Neoadjuvant Therapy
timeline.body: Preferred: Regimens used for unresectable/metastatic disease. Alternatives: Clinical trial participation.

timeline.title: 1st Line
timeline.body: Preferred: Cisplatin/gemcitabine + durvalumab (category 1) OR cisplatin/gemcitabine + pembrolizumab (category 1). Alternatives: Cisplatin/gemcitabine (category 1), albumin-bound paclitaxel/gemcitabine, capecitabine/gemcitabine, capecitabine/oxaliplatin, FOLFOX, gemcitabine/oxaliplatin, single agents.

timeline.title: 2nd Line
timeline.body: Preferred: FOLFOX. Alternatives: FOLFIRI, fluorouracil/leucovorin/liposomal irinotecan (category 2B), regorafenib (category 2B), or regimens used in first-line if not previously used.

timeline.title: Targeted Therapy
timeline.body: Preferred: Varies by biomarker (e.g., ivosidenib for IDH1-mutated, futibatinib for FGFR2 fusion/rearranged, dabrafenib/trametinib for BRAF V600E). Alternatives: Clinical trials.
